creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Greg Lewis from comment #2)

Are you willing to apply the patch then? I want to work on Bug 229329 which is basically trivial to do. As complement for certcl until OpenSSL 3.0.x can handle PKCS 12 trust stores with oracleJdkTruststoreUsage as bag attribute.
